items.title: Notebook EDA checklist before modeling
items.description: Bar charts for target and key categoricals, histograms for numeric features, scatter for suspect pairs, and a correlation heatmap form a standard first-pass that surfaces imbalance, skew, redundancy, and bivariate structure.

items.title: Training run monitoring dashboards
items.description: Line charts of loss, accuracy, and learning rate over epochs answer whether training is converging or overfitting— the default monitoring view in ML experiment logs.

items.title: Stakeholder reports and slide decks
items.description: Bar charts for KPI comparisons and box plots for latency or error distributions communicate one message per slide; choosing the right family avoids misread trends on unordered categories.

items.title: Feature-selection and multicollinearity review
items.description: Heatmaps of feature correlations highlight redundant columns; scatter plots of top candidate pairs confirm nonlinear relationships a correlation coefficient alone would miss.

items.title: Model comparison across segments
items.description: Box plots of precision or revenue lift by customer segment show whether a global metric hides poor performance in a subgroup—common in fairness and business ML reviews.
